title: How to Think Like a Disciple in Any Decision
caption:
Wisdom isn't a Sunday thing. It's a Tuesday-at-your-desk thing.

The same mind that follows Christ on Sunday is supposed to run your Monday — the hard call at work, the text you shouldn't send, the apology you're avoiding.

Thinking like a disciple is just a few habits: start with what's true (not what you want), find the real question, ask who it serves, then decide in faith and hold it open-handed.

Which of these would change your next hard call? Save this and use one this week.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #wisdom #godlymen #manofgod #christianity
theme: Think like a disciple, not just on Sunday.
